And then human intervention here that we say it's going to be here, and we don't evaluate.
And in the best case scenario, it's, like, hey, we have all this context.
Like, there's no reason why you couldn't, like, you know, have a coding agent come up with, like, 10 different iterations of combinations.

And then, you know, kind of do kind of almost like a mixture of expert like concept of like picking which ones are the best ones, you know, and pulling it together based on evaluations and historical data and then serving to an expert like, you know, pick your path here, you know, kind of thing, you know, and, you know, so that's what's possible.
But like today, like so many people are just going black box direction that I think we have the different inside.
We're contrarian here.
It's like, I do not want this agent to go do something for 20 minutes.
Like what?
It has no context in me, on me and company or what I'm trying to do, you know, and it's like, you don't have any confidence.
And so like, you know, they're spinning out this data, like even Manus, Manus is amazing, like play with it, right?
Like, and it's really good for like, here's a spreadsheet, go do this thing times 10,000, you know, come back to me.
In 30 minutes, that's great, right?
But but what it like, but they have no signal on how I'm using this.
Or, like, what I'm actually trying to achieve, right?
Like, that information is not there.
They're not sitting down with the founder of Biologica, Joey, and asking them why they started the business and getting that real amazing input, right?
And signal.
They're not getting the Slack message back saying, this is incredible, I love this.
Like, you know, like, they're not getting that, right?
And, like, we get access to that.
And that's what's really, really unique.

And I know that doesn't scale crazy, but, like, if everything else scales, like, that's actually not a hard thing to do, to just spend 30 minutes with our stakeholder asking some good questions, you know?
So, anyways, as you guys can tell, I love the , and I'm so excited for what we're building and feel humble and thankful that you all are here and choosing to be part of the journey, you know?
Yeah.
Thanks for having us here.
Awesome.
All right.
Thank you all.
Talk soon.
Yeah.

## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding new team members with GrowthX's strategy, vision, and product direction.](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building a common core that powers services and potential future products, using service as R\&D to validate and fund development](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [The company's unique approach combines expert knowledge, AI technology, and real-world outputs to create a "factory for expert data"](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Long-term vision includes potential productization of workflows, fact-checking tools, and expansion into various domains (e.g., e-commerce, recruiting)](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Evolution

  - [Started with content strategy services for brands, using workflows to systematize expert processes](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Transitioned to coding agents and AI-powered workflows due to scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Current positioning: $5-15k/month service replacing multiple freelancers and full-time content leads](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Building a "factory for expert data" by combining expert thought processes, AI, and real-world client scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Technology Stack and Approach

  - [Uses coding agents and Temporal for a powerful runtime layer](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Focus on creating reproducible but adaptable expert thought processes](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Emphasis on finding the most impactful places for human/expert intervention](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [Goal: Create plans (equivalent to source code) for knowledge work that become a company's most valuable IP](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)

### Evaluation and Improvement Process

  - [Drawing parallels with autonomous driving data labeling pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Implementing calibration processes for human interventions](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Using context and artifacts to improve AI judgments and guide human editors](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Aiming to make expert interventions easier, faster, and more effective over time](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

### Future Product Directions

  - [Potential productization of workflows, fact-checker tool, and other capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Exploring opportunities in e-commerce (product descriptions, catalog management)](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Applying workflows to hiring processes with recruiters in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Balancing growth with investment in core technology and foundation](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### Key Principles for Future Development

1.  Ride the model wave: Benefit from improvements in AI models
2.  Continuous improvement: Every output should improve the next output

<!-- end list -->

  - [Focus on evaluating and learning from interactions](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [Aim for a reinforcing flywheel of improvement](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue balancing service delivery with core technology development](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Explore potential productization opportunities (e.g., fact-checker, workflow tools)](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Invest in evaluation and learning mechanisms to improve outputs continuously](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [Consider slowing growth slightly to invest more in foundational technology](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [Maintain focus on capturing unique insights and context from client interactions](https://fathom.video/share/RGbUdx_wVKXYJodhw4Bi8rxxqnyTjBLz?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
